payload.title: Live toast column — SSE-driven, large screens only
payload.description: Floating column fixed to bottom-right of screen. Listens to the existing SSE change bus and renders a toast per event (ticket created/updated, status changed, comment added). Shows 3-4 toasts at a time in a scrollable column with a CSS opacity mask at the top edge. Appears only on screens ≥1280px wide (hidden via media query on compact). Each toast has: type icon, ticket id, brief description of the change, timestamp. On hover over the column, a circular 'open' icon button appears on each toast — clicking it opens the drawer for that ticket.
